description: baseline (no modifications)

Reduce DEVICE_BATCH_SIZE from default to 4 to maximize gradient steps

Set DEVICE_BATCH_SIZE to 1 to maximize gradient steps within the 5-minute budget
Reduce DEPTH from default to 8 to decrease model size and enable faster training
Set TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE to 16 to ensure gradient accumulation works with small device batches
Set TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE to 8 to enable even more aggressive gradient accumulation
Set EMBEDDING_LR from 0.6 to 0.1 to use more conservative learning rates
Set DEPTH to 4 to create a very small model that can definitely fit and run
Set ASPECT_RATIO from 64 to 32 to reduce model width and potentially fix initialization issues
Set HEAD_DIM from 128 to 64 to reduce memory per attention head and potentially fix model initialization issues
Set WINDOW_PATTERN from "SSSL" to "SSSS" to simplify attention pattern and avoid potential initialization issues

Set DEPTH to 1 to create the minimal possible model that can run

Set UNEMBEDDING_LR from 0.004 to 0.001 to use more conservative learning rate for the output layer
